compiled_state.title: As a developer, I can read docs and skills without encountering v2 tk or .tickets/ references
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Remove v2 references from documentation and skill files. Delete ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md. Update docs that reference both tk and ticket CLIs to reference only ticket CLI and bridge workflows.
**Why**: Docs with v2 references confuse agents that read them for context about how the ticket system works.
**Scope**:
- IN: Delete plugins/dso/docs/ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md entirely. Update ticket-cli-reference.md (remove tk wrapper row from overview, remove tk from sync docs, remove legacy archive mention). Update WORKTREE-GUIDE.md (rewrite v2 .tickets/ references to describe v3 orphan branch model). Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (remove issue_tracker.create_cmd section, update Used by fields that reference tk script to reference v3 equivalents). Update ticket-sync-events-contract.md line 20 (replace tk wrapper reference with bridge-outbound.py and bridge-inbound.py). Update PRE-COMMIT-TIMEOUT-WRAPPER.md (remove issue_tracker.create_cmd references). Update dso-config.example.conf (remove issue_tracker.create_cmd line). Update validate-work skills (remove tk references from tickets-health.md and SKILL.md). Update merge-to-main.sh comments referencing v2 .tickets/ paths.
- OUT: ADR (adr-ticket-v3-event-sourced-storage.md) is historical context — leave as-is. Scripts code changes (story 1). Tests (story 5).

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md is deleted. Satisfies: ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md is deleted
- When this story is complete, no documentation or skill file (outside ADRs) references the tk command or .tickets/ directory. Satisfies: Documentation references only the v3 ticket CLI and bridge workflows
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has many tk references in Used by fields — each must be checked for a v3 equivalent or removed if the config key is tk-only
- [Maintainability] WORKTREE-GUIDE.md describes .tickets/ as git-tracked and shared — needs rewrite to describe v3 orphan branch model
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All 7 child tasks closed. Story complete.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
